task_goal: Delete the file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg from the Android filesystem located in the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area.
task_goal_rewrite: The file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg is no longer present in the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 (canonical /sdcard) storage area of the Android filesystem.

checkpoints.description: The file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg is not visible in the contents of the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 (canonical /sdcard) storage area.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or file directory list showing the Pictures folder contents without the filename '2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg'.

checkpoints.description: The file explorer or filesystem UI confirms access to the Pictures folder in the sdk_gphone64_arm64 (canonical /sdcard) storage area.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot displaying the storage label (e.g., sdk_gphone64_arm64) and 'Pictures' folder path in the active file directory view.

success_rule: Success is achieved if both required checkpoints are satisfied: the specified file is absent from the correct Pictures folder, and the UI confirms the correct storage area and folder were accessed for the delete operation.
